name: Pasta Aglio e Olio

ingredients.item: red pepper flakes ( less if you don't like spicy)

method: Boil salted water for the pasta, add pasta. In the meantime, heat the olive oil and red pepper in a frying pan on low heat.

Add garlic and lightly sauté on low, paying careful attention to NOT burn the garlic! Turn off heat. Add cooked spaghetti right to frying pan and mix, then manticare. You can also quickly mix it round and round if you can’t do the manticare technique well, which is what I do when Leo isn't around. Toss in parsley and top with grated pecorino cheese (optional). In Italy, they often make this pasta at midnight! Serves 2-3. Serving suggestion: fresh bread and salad. Olé
